children.heading: Fish habitat Partnerships and conservation projects
children.label: 1 Fish habitat Partnerships and conservation projects
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $7,200,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2030 to provide funds for Partnership operations under and fish habitat conservation projects approved under , of which 5 percent is authorized only for projects carried out by Indian Tribes.section 8204 of this titlesection 8205(f) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: for administrative and planning expenses under this chapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: to carry out .section 8209 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: $400,000 to the Secretary for use by the United States Fish and Wildlife Service;

children.label: B
children.text: $400,000 to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration Assistant Administrator for use by the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration;

children.label: C
children.text: $400,000 to the Environmental Protection Agency Assistant Administrator for use by the Environmental Protection Agency;

children.label: D
children.text: $400,000 to the Secretary for use by the United States Geological Survey; and

children.label: E
children.text: $400,000 to the Secretary of Agriculture, acting through the Chief of the Forest Service, for use by the Forest Service.

on the recommendation of the Board, and notwithstanding sections 6304 and 6305 of title 31 and the Federal Financial Assistance Management Improvement Act of 1999 ( note; ), enter into a grant agreement, cooperative agreement, or contract with a Partnership or other entity to provide funds authorized by this chapter for a fish habitat conservation project or restoration or enhancement project;31 U.S.C. 6101Public Law 106–107
apply for, accept, and, subject to the availability of appropriations, use a grant from any individual or entity to carry out the purposes of this chapter; and

subject to the availability of appropriations, make funds authorized by this Act available to any Federal department or agency for use by that department or agency to provide grants for any fish habitat protection project, restoration project, or enhancement project that the Secretary determines to be consistent with this chapter.
